Our HVAC Services

From emergency repairs to full system installations, we keep your home comfortable year-round.

Furnace Repair & Installation

Fast, reliable furnace repair and new high-efficiency installations to keep your home warm all winter.

AC Repair & Installation

Beat the heat with expert air conditioning repair, maintenance, and energy-efficient system installations.

Heating Maintenance

Regular maintenance keeps your system running efficiently, extends its life, and prevents costly breakdowns.

Thermostat & Controls

Smart thermostat installation and upgrade services for better comfort control and energy savings.

Ductwork & Ventilation

Duct cleaning, sealing, and new ductwork installation for optimal airflow and indoor air quality.

Emergency Repairs

24/7 emergency HVAC repair services when you need them most. Call us anytime for urgent service.

Frequently Asked Questions

Quick answers to common questions about our HVAC services.

What services does Oakland Furnace provide? ▼
We provide comprehensive HVAC services including furnace repair and installation, air conditioning repair and installation, heating system maintenance, ductwork services, thermostat installation, and indoor air quality solutions for residential and commercial customers in Oakland and the East Bay.
Do you offer emergency HVAC services? ▼
Yes, we offer emergency HVAC repair services. Call us at (925) 310-8491 for immediate assistance. We prioritize urgent calls and strive to get your system back up and running as quickly as possible.
What areas do you serve? ▼
We serve Oakland, Piedmont, Berkeley, Emeryville, Alameda, and the greater East Bay area in California. Contact us to see if we service your specific location.
Do you provide free estimates? ▼
Yes, we offer free, no-obligation estimates for all HVAC repair and installation services. Contact us to schedule an appointment.
